channel.title: Target Account Strategy on
channel.description: Recent content in Target Account Strategy on

item.title: Navigating Account-Based Marketing
item.description: Navigating the Complexities and Costs of Account-Based Marketing for B2B ABM sounds fantastic in a board deck. Pick the right accounts. Personalize everything. Align sales and marketing. Win bigger deals. What usually gets left out of the presentation is the inconvenient part: ABM is expensive, operationally messy, and very easy to do badly with beautiful software and mediocre thinking. That does not mean ABM is a bad idea. It means it is not magic.
